source_pr.title: *: replace github.com/etcd-io/gofail with the forked one
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? With the adoption of Go module, GOPATH is not need any more But github.com/etcd-io/gofail doesn't support packages outside the GOPATH To overcome the drawback, this commit replace it with our forked one ### What is changed and how it works? Update go.mod and package reference path ### Check List Tests - No code --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8693)

fix_pattern: *: replace github.com/etcd-io/gofail with the forked one
